Data sources

Earthquake catalog: USGS ANSS ComCat via FDSN. ~300,000 events at M4.5+ globally since 1960. Live mode polls the USGS real-time M2.5+ feed.

Fatality, injury, damage: NOAA NCEI Significant Earthquake Database. ~1,580 events have casualty data attached. Death counts include tsunami fatalities (flagged in tooltips and the major-event sidebar where applicable).

Major events on the timeline: hand-curated mix of M8.5+ and high-impact earthquakes; click any dot for details.

Basemap: OpenFreeMap.

Source: github.com/whitehatnetizen/earthquakes
